content: I’m a Data Science student who loves learning new things in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. I recently worked on a project where the Agent learns to play Tennis as a part of Udacity Nanodegree. Right now, I am working on making an app for translating the Board Sign languages to English. Skills: Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Analysis
summary: I’m a Data Science student who loves learning new things in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. I recently worked on a project where the Agent learns to play Tennis as a part of Udacity Nanodegree.
title: Abhinav Kumar Dubey

summary: This Python script was built in order to Automate the joining process of zoom meetings.
title: Automating Zoom Meeting Joining

summary: Scrape Worldometer's Coronavirus Data and transform the data into a .CSV and a .JSON file.
title: Covid19 Data Scrapping from Worldometer

summary: In this environment, two agents control rackets to bounce a ball over a net. If an agent hits the ball over the net, it receives a reward of +0.1. If an agent lets a ball hit the ground or hits the ball out of bounds, it receives a reward of -0.01. Thus, the goal of each agent is to keep the ball in play.
title: Reinforcement Learning- Virtual Tennis

summary: In this project, we teach an AI reinforcement learning agent in the Unity Reacher environment to direct a double-jointed robot arm to a target location - marked below by a green bubble - and to maintain contact with the target location for as long as possible. A reward of +0.1 is given for each time step that the agent's hand is in the target location, and the environment is considered solved when the robot arm agent attains an average score of 30+ points over 100 consecutive episodes.
title: Reinforcement Learning- Continous Control

summary: In this project, the goal is to teach a reinforcement learning AI agent to navigate a Unity environment and play a simple game - collecting yellow bananas (with a reward of +1) and avoiding blue ones (with a reward of (-1).
title: Reinforcement Learning- Banana Navigation
